problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: The key to Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? is Topological insulator surface state conduction — specifically Topological insulator surface — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
